# Robot Vision with Bitmap Processing

This is a Python project for robot vision using bitmap image processing.

## Project Guidelines

- Use Python 3.8+ for all code
- Follow PEP 8 style guidelines
- Use the bitmap library for image processing operations
- Organize vision algorithms in modular functions
- Include type hints in function signatures
- Document all functions with docstrings

## Code Style
- Use descriptive variable names related to robotics/vision domain
- Keep functions focused and single-purpose
- Add error handling for image processing operations
- Use numpy for array operations when needed

## Testing
- Include unit tests for vision algorithms
- Test with sample bitmap images
- Validate robot interface functionality
